search_feed.title: GIFT City funds ask government to undo RBI’s foreign asset reporting mandate
search_feed.summary: Alternative Investment funds warn that the RBI’s rule that deems them resident Indians when reporting foreign assets creates a regulatory overlap that threatens their offshore status and ease of doing business at the international finance hub.
